product_overview: ReelMatrix is a single-page Next.js app that shows a 3-tier sample content matrix on first load, lets users generate a custom content matrix via /api/generate, and persists generated matrices to localStorage for automatic restore on subsequent visits.
core_goals: Show a clearly labeled sample 3-tier content matrix on first visit so users understand the product immediately
Allow users to generate a tailored 3-tier content matrix by completing a short intake form and calling /api/generate
Enforce client-side validation and a 30-second API timeout with clear error states and a Retry path
Persist generated results to localStorage and automatically restore them on subsequent page loads

features.name: Sample Matrix on First Load
features.description: Display a hardcoded sample 3-tier content matrix automatically when there is no persisted matrix in localStorage; all tier headings and card fields are visible without user action and a banner explains it is a sample.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Page loads and immediately shows Tier 1 heading with data-testid tier-heading-1 -> Page loads and immediately shows Tier 2 heading with data-testid tier-heading-2 -> Page loads and immediately shows Tier 3 heading with data-testid tier-heading-3 -> Each card shows card-title, card-script, card-format, card-channel, card-angle, card-goal -> See Format badge text starts with "Format:" prefix -> See Channel badge text starts with "Channel:" prefix -> See Angle badge text starts with "Angle:" prefix -> See Goal line text starts with "Goal:" prefix -> See banner at top of matrix column that says "Sample matrix — fill in the form and click Generate to create your own"

Navigate to / with a saved matrix present in localStorage -> Page loads and restores persisted matrix instead of showing the sample banner -> See Tier headings and card fields present from persisted matrix

features.name: Generate Content Matrix
features.description: User fills four required intake fields and clicks Generate to request a generated content matrix from POST /api/generate. Client-side validation runs before submission, a 30-second timeout is enforced, and results are saved to localStorage on success. Loading skeletons are shown while waiting and clear error banners are shown on failure.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill Product Name input required field -> Fill Product Description textarea required field -> Fill Target Users textarea required field -> Fill Core Features textarea required field -> Click Generate Content Matrix button -> See 3 animated loading skeleton cards while waiting for API -> POST /api/generate is sent -> Receive successful API response within 30 seconds -> Matrix updates with generated content and sample banner disappears -> Persist generated matrix to localStorage automatically

Navigate to / -> Leave Product Name input empty -> Fill Product Description textarea required field -> Fill Target Users textarea required field -> Fill Core Features textarea required field -> Click Generate Content Matrix button -> See inline error below Product Name field with data-testid error-productName

Navigate to / -> Fill Product Name input required field -> Fill Product Description textarea required field -> Fill Target Users textarea required field -> Fill Core Features textarea required field -> Click Generate Content Matrix button -> See 3 animated loading skeleton cards while waiting for API -> POST /api/generate is sent -> Request times out after 30 seconds -> See titled error banner with data-testid error-timeout and a Retry button

features.name: Persisted Matrix Restore
features.description: After a successful generation the resulting matrix is saved to localStorage. On subsequent page loads the saved matrix is restored immediately with no loading state or sample banner, preserving all tier headings and card content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill Product Name input required field -> Fill Product Description textarea required field -> Fill Target Users textarea required field -> Fill Core Features textarea required field -> Click Generate Content Matrix button -> Receive successful API response -> Matrix updates and is saved to localStorage -> Reload page (navigate to /) -> Matrix is immediately visible with no loading skeleton and no sample banner -> All tier headings and card fields are present

Navigate to / -> Fill Product Name input required field -> Fill Product Description textarea required field -> Fill Target Users textarea required field -> Fill Core Features textarea required field -> Click Generate Content Matrix button -> Receive successful API response -> Matrix updates and is saved to localStorage -> Clear localStorage manually -> Reload page (navigate to /) -> Sample matrix is shown because persisted matrix is missing

routes.description: Main page. A 3-tier content matrix is always visible on load — either a built-in sample or last AI-generated result from localStorage.

features.name: Sample Matrix on First Load
features.description: A hardcoded sample 3-tier content matrix is shown on every fresh page load when no localStorage entry exists. All tier headings and card fields are always visible without any user action.
user_interactions: Page loads and immediately shows Tier 1 heading with data-testid tier-heading-1
Page loads and immediately shows Tier 2 heading with data-testid tier-heading-2
Page loads and immediately shows Tier 3 heading with data-testid tier-heading-3
Each card shows card-title, card-script, card-format, card-channel, card-angle, card-goal
Format badge text starts with "Format:" prefix
Channel badge text starts with "Channel:" prefix
Angle badge text starts with "Angle:" prefix
Goal line text starts with "Goal:" prefix
A banner at top of matrix column says "Sample matrix — fill in the form and click Generate to create your own"

features.name: Generate Content Matrix
features.description: User fills 4 required fields and clicks Generate. 30-second timeout enforced. Client-side validation runs before API call. On success matrix updates and is saved to localStorage.
user_interactions: Fill Product Name input required field
Fill Product Description textarea required field
Fill Target Users textarea required field
Fill Core Features textarea required field
Click Generate Content Matrix button
If any field is empty see inline error below that field with data-testid error-productName or error-description or error-targetUsers or error-coreFeatures
See 3 animated loading skeleton cards while waiting for API
On success matrix updates and sample banner disappears
On error see titled error banner with data-testid error-timeout or error-network or error-api or error-unknown and a Retry button

features.name: Persisted Matrix Restore
features.description: After successful generation result is saved to localStorage. On next page load saved matrix is restored automatically with no loading state.
user_interactions: Generate matrix successfully
Reload page
Matrix is immediately visible with no loading skeleton and no sample banner
All tier headings and card fields are present

known_limitations.issue: Sample matrix is hardcoded and unrelated to the user's actual product until they generate
known_limitations.impact: Low — sample banner clearly labels it as a sample
